text = open("/mnt/data/file-KfMjt7FKkbpdZcBuBPqHwG-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()

# explicit quotes spans (we computed earlier)
indices = [i for i,ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
pairs = list(zip(indices[::2], indices[1::2]))
explicit_spans = [(s+1, e, text[s+1:e]) for (s, e) in pairs]
explicit_spans

import re
phrase = "شجرة تخرج من أصل النار"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phrase), text):
    print(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.end()])

paraphrase_hadith = "شجرة طول ورقها مثل رأس الفرس، وعرقها مثل أقرع الوعول، وطعمها مثل الزقوم، ورائحتها مثل رائحة الجرذان"
idx = text.find(paraphrase_hadith)
idx, len(paraphrase_hadith), text[idx: idx+len(paraphrase_hadith)]

import json

text = open("/mnt/data/file-KfMjt7FKkbpdZcBuBPqHwG-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()

citations = []

# 1. Quoted Quranic (claimed) verse
start1, end1, span1 = 70, 151, text[70:151]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start1,
    "span_end": end1,
    "span_text": span1,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الدخان", "sura_number": 44, "aya_number": 43},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّومِ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 2. Quoted hadith text
start2, end2, span2 = 208, 339, text[208:339]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start2,
    "span_end": end2,
    "span_text": span2,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 3. Paraphrase of ayah: "شجرة تخرج من أصل النار"
start3, end3 = 434, 456
span3 = text[start3:end3]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start3,
    "span_end": end3,
    "span_text": span3,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الصافات", "sura_number": 37, "aya_number": 64},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِي أَصْلِ الْجَحِيمِ",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 4. Paraphrase of hadith segment in second paragraph
start4 = text.find("شجرة طول ورقها مثل رأس الفرس، وعرقها مثل أقرع الوعول، وطعمها مثل الزقوم، ورائحتها مثل رائحة الجرذان")
end4 = start4 + len("شجرة طول ورقها مثل رأس الفرس، وعرقها مثل أقرع الوعول، وطعمها مثل الزقوم، ورائحتها مثل رائحة الجرذان")
span4 = text[start4:end4]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start4,
    "span_end": end4,
    "span_text": span4,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":70,"span_end":151,"span_text":"وَطَعَامُهُمْ مِنْ غِلْمَانٍ مِنْ حُنْطَةٍ وَنَوْلٍ وَمِنْ شَجَرَةٍ مِنْ زَقُّومٍ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الدخان","sura_number":44,"aya_number":43},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّومِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":208,"span_end":339,"span_text":"إنها شجرة تخرج في أصلها من أصل النار، طول ورقها مثل رأس الفرس، وعرقها مثل أقرع الوعول، طعمها مثل الزقوم، ورائحتها مثل رائحة الجرذان","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":434,"span_end":456,"span_text":"شجرة تخرج من أصل النار","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الصافات","sura_number":37,"aya_number":64},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِي أَصْلِ الْجَحِيمِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":493,"span_end":592,"span_text":"شجرة طول ورقها مثل رأس الفرس، وعرقها مثل أقرع الوعول، وطعمها مثل الزقوم، ورائحتها مثل رائحة الجرذان","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
